rawIntent: Add a clamp utility under src/shared/utils/clamp with clamp(n: number, min: number, max: number): number that returns n clamped to the [min, max] inclusive range.

successCriteria.description: The clamp utility function is implemented and returns the correct clamped value.

constraints: Every state-changing operation produces an audit record
RBAC enforced at middleware, never inline
Input validated at the API boundary
outOfScope: Any other utilities or modules outside src/shared/utils/clamp
